message:
fix(dispatch): break circular import and improve documentation

- Import getPersona, buildSystemPromptContext directly from agent-personas.ts
  instead of index.ts to break circular dependency
- Add TODO comment documenting fragile response matching logic in pollForResponses
- Document unused _hypothesis parameter in getFallbackContent (reserved for future)
